ecarx.carext.storage

Interface IPersistentStorage

  • All Superinterfaces:
    BaseAPI

    public interface IPersistentStorage
extends BaseAPI
    This class provides the primary API for accessing persistent storage.
    Since:
    5

    • Nested Class Summary

      • Nested classes/interfaces inherited from interface ecarx.carext.base.BaseAPI

        BaseAPI.Callback

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Default Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      default boolean deleteFile(java.lang.String fileName)
      Deletes the file denoted by the fileName.
      default byte[] readFromFile(java.lang.String fileName)
      Reads bytes from the file denoted by the fileName.
      default boolean writeToFile(java.lang.String fileName, byte[] data)
      Writes bytes from the data byte array to a file denoted by the fileName.

      • Methods inherited from interface ecarx.carext.base.BaseAPI

        init, onRelease

    • Method Detail

      • readFromFile

        @NonNull
 @RequiresPermission(value="ecarx.openapi.permission.READ_PERSISTENT_STORAGE")
default byte[] readFromFile(@NonNull
                                                                                                                    java.lang.String fileName)
                                                                                                             throws java.io.IOException
        Reads bytes from the file denoted by the fileName.
        Parameters:
        fileName - the name of the file to read.
        Returns:
        the data in the file.
        Throws:
        java.io.FileNotFoundException - if the file does not exist.
        java.io.IOException - if an I/O error occurs.
        Since:
        5

      • writeToFile

        @RequiresPermission(value="ecarx.openapi.permission.WRITE_PERSISTENT_STORAGE")
default boolean writeToFile(@NonNull
                                                                                                           java.lang.String fileName,
                                                                                                           @NonNull
                                                                                                           byte[] data)
                                                                                                    throws java.io.IOException
        Writes bytes from the data byte array to a file denoted by the fileName.
        Parameters:
        fileName - the name of the file to write.
        data - the data to be written.
        Returns:
        true if the data is successfully written; false otherwise
        Throws:
        java.io.IOException - if an I/O error occurs.
        Since:
        5

      • deleteFile

        @RequiresPermission(value="ecarx.openapi.permission.WRITE_PERSISTENT_STORAGE")
default boolean deleteFile(@NonNull
                                                                                                          java.lang.String fileName)
                                                                                                   throws java.io.IOException
        Deletes the file denoted by the fileName.
        Parameters:
        fileName - the name of the file to delete.
        Returns:
        true if the file is successfully deleted; false otherwise
        Throws:
        java.io.FileNotFoundException - if the file does not exist.
        java.io.IOException - if an I/O error occurs.
        Since:
        5
